DP.168.0000:
You want to challenge Candice?\f
Sure thing!
I was waiting for someone tough!\f
But I should tell you, I’m tough
because I know how to focus.\f
Pokémon, fashion, romance...
It’s all about focus!\f
I’ll show you just what I mean.
Get ready to lose!\f
DP.168.0001:
Wow! You’re great!
You’ve earned my respect!\f
I think your focus and will bowled
us over totally.\f
Oh, that’s right!
I’m supposed to give you this!\f
DP.168.0002:
[0103,0000] received
the Icicle Badge from Candice.
DP.168.0003:
That Icicle Badge I just gave you?\f
Because you have it, you can use the
hidden move Rock Climb anytime, even\r
when you’re not in a battle.\f
Oh, and take this, too.\f
DP.168.0004:
[0108,0000] contains the move
[0106,0001].\f
If the user takes damage, the move’s
power is doubled!\f
Can you imagine what sort of focus
you’d need to pull it off?
DP.168.0005:
Do you think I should try to act
more like an Ice-type Gym Leader?\f
Like, do you think I should be more
cool and distant?\f
That sort of thing I have trouble
with.
DP.168.0006:
Hey, there!
How’s it going, Champ-to-be?\f
Do you see the big snowballs placed
here and there?\f
You need to slide on the ice with
enough momentum to crush them.\f
The Gym Leader is a user of
Ice-type Pokémon.\f
Melt her defenses with scorching-
hot Fire-type moves!\f
It’s all about focus with this Gym.
Bear down and focus!
DP.168.0007:
Oh! [0103,0000]!
You’ve beaten the Gym Leader!\f
You were more focused than her,
and your Pokémon picked up on it!

Leader: Candice\f
Certified Trainers:
[0103,0001]
